title: French Clafoutis with Ginger
description: A twist on the classic French dessert, infused with the warm spice of ginger.
instructions: Butter a 9x13-inch baking dish and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the almond flour, sugar, and eggs.
Stir in the grated ginger and vanilla extract.
Arrange the sliced peaches in the prepared baking dish.
Pour the batter over the peaches and smooth the top.
Dot the top with the unsalted butter.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the clafoutis is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
